name: Camera Windows capture
nativeBoundary: Media Foundation COM interfaces for IMFActivate, IMFMediaSource, IMFSourceReader, IMFSample, and IMFMediaBuffer
normalContractTests: synthetic latest-frame preview keeps bounded memory
synthetic loss-sensitive mode drops newest when full
preview adapter keeps and transfers latest frame
hardwareTests: enumerate built-in and USB cameras with stable opaque IDs
activate selected camera source without silently switching devices
negotiate native Source Reader format exactly
deliver asynchronous frames on the capture thread
observe format-change, discontinuity, end-of-stream, privacy-denial, and shutdown faults
stop/dispose releases camera indicator/resources and produces no later callbacks
